title: Generated MTG Deck
description: A collection of cards united by a loose theme and a color identity. Defaults to Commander/EDH construction. See DECK_BUILDING_GUIDE.md.

border.description: 'black' (default) for rules-legal decks. 'acorn' for an Un-set chaos deck: color-identity legality and the singleton rule are not enforced, and bracket is not required. See UNHINGED_GUIDE.md.

format.description: Construction ruleset. 'commander' = 100-card singleton led by a legendary creature. 'freeform' = no size or singleton constraints.

theme.description: The loose theme / game plan, in a sentence.

artDirection.description: Base art prompt establishing the deck's shared visual world (setting, palette, mood, motifs, era). Prepended to each card's artPrompt at image-generation time for set cohesion.

colorIdentity.description: The deck's color identity. Every card's colorIdentity must be a subset of this. Empty for a colorless deck.

commander.description: Card name(s) of the commander(s). One, or two for partner/background. Required for format 'commander'. The deck's colorIdentity must equal the union of the commanders' color identities.

bracket.description: Commander power bracket: 1 Exhibition, 2 Core, 3 Upgraded, 4 Optimized, 5 cEDH.

cards.description: The cards assigned to this deck so far. Each entry references a card by name (matched against cards/*.json). A deck may be a work in progress — list only the cards that exist; use 'plan' to document the intended full build.

name.description: Card name; matched against cards/*.json by exact name.

count.description: Number of copies. Must be 1 in singleton formats except basic lands.

role.description: The functional role this card fills in the deck.

note.description: Optional reason this card is in the deck.

plan.description: Target composition to fill the deck to size. Documents intent; not enforced by the schema. Keys other than 'size' are category names mapped to a target card count.

size.description: Total card count the finished deck should reach (100 for Commander, including the commander).
